column2: # Step 2: Set consistent y-axis limits and ticks
y_breaks <- seq(0.5, 2.7, by = 0.5)  # Set y-axis ticks at 0.25 intervals
# Step 3: Create the line plot for Turn-Processing Pause and Turn-Yielding Pause
plot_typ_procp <- ggplot(proc_typ_combined, aes(x = eng_level, y = avg_duration, fill = condition)) +  # Use fill instead of color
geom_boxplot() +  # Boxplots with no outlier shapes
facet_grid(. ~ event_type, scales = "free", space = "free") +  # Facet by event type
scale_y_continuous(limits = y_limits, breaks = y_breaks, sec.axis = dup_axis(name = NULL)) +  # Consistent y-axis limits and ticks
scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Dark2") +  # Use fill instead of color for the Brewer palette
labs(x = "Engagement Condition", y = "Average Duration (s)", fill = "Condition") +  # Change legend label from color to fill
panel.spacing = unit(1, "lines"))+  # Adjust space between panels
